results.title: Cart Merge - No Duplicate SKUs
results.notes: User added UMIDIGI G6 qty2 (logged in), logged out, guest added same SKU qty1, signed in. Merged cart shows exactly 1 line item, qty=3 (2+1), line total $435 ($145x3), subtotal $435. No duplicate lines. Item selected-for-checkout=ON. BL-CART-008 + BL-CART-007 honored. Benign Apollo cache 'currencyCode missing' warning on add-to-cart (cosmetic, cart state correct) — not a defect.

results.title: Cart Merge - Persists After Logout and Re-login
results.notes: Guest added Fanta Orange qty2, signed in (merge): cart = 1 line, qty2, line total $30, subtotal $30. Logged out, signed in again: cart persisted identically (Fanta qty2, $30, single line, selected ON). No items lost/duplicated, subtotal unchanged. No console JS errors. BL-CART-008 honored. (Logout performed from static /contacts page to avoid Firefox header stability quirk.)
results.evidence: snapshot .vc-line-items @ /cart post-relogin qty=2 Fanta single line

results.title: Cart Merge - Different Product Types
results.notes: Requires selecting a Color variant on the Configurable Hat PDP. The config widget (color radios, Add-to-cart) is unclickable in Firefox: click/hover on the radio label and Add-to-cart button repeatedly time out on Playwright's stability gate (lazy-loaded option-card images keep CLS non-zero) — documented Firefox /cart-style stability quirk extended to the configurable PDP, NOT a product defect. Also note: CFG_HAT alias URL drift — real PDP is /products-with-options/configurable-products/configurable-hat (CSV/alias still says /configurable-caps-shirts/...). Verify on Edge/Chrome.
results.evidence: click+hover timeouts on label[for=vc-radio-button-670-input] and Add-to-cart @ configurable-hat PDP; cfg-hat-real-pdp.md snapshot

results.title: Cart Merge - Configurable Product, Different Options Create Separate Lines
results.notes: Same blocker as CART-061: Configurable Hat config widget (color radios / Add to cart) unclickable in Firefox due to stability-gate quirk on the animated/lazy-loading PDP. Cannot select option A/B to build the two configurations. Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.title: Cart Merge - Same Configurable Product Same Configuration Sums Quantity
results.notes: Same blocker as CART-061: Configurable Hat config widget unclickable in Firefox. Cannot select the matching configuration in user + guest carts. Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.title: Cart Merge - Configurable Product, Different Configs Across User and Guest Carts
results.notes: Same blocker as CART-061: Configurable Hat config widget unclickable in Firefox. Cannot select distinct options across carts. Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.title: Cart Merge - Anonymous Then Register
results.notes: Requires registering a brand-new account and completing email verification (CSV NOTE: no auto-login; must verify email then sign in). No test-email inbox or Admin SPA account-confirmation access on this Firefox runner slot, so the verify→sign-in→merge path cannot be completed end-to-end. The generic guest-cart-preserved-after-auth invariant (BL-CART-008) IS covered by CART-058/060 PASS. Recommend executing CART-057 where an inbox/admin confirm is available.

results.title: Cart Merge - Currency Mismatch
results.notes: Needs guest(USD)->sign-in-as-EUR-user transition. Currently authenticated as slot-2 (B2B/USD); reaching a clean guest session requires logout, and the header logout control is unclickable in Firefox this session (stability-gate quirk, 15+ click/hover timeouts documented across /cart,/,/dashboard,/catalog,/contacts). EUR user available (@td USER_EUR). Verify on Edge/Chrome.
results.evidence: header logout click timeouts (Firefox stability quirk)

results.title: Cart Merge - Smart Merge Failure Handling
results.notes: UI portion (guest add -> sign in -> /cart loads without JS crash, consistent state) is INCIDENTALLY satisfied — CART-058 & CART-060 normal merges produced a clean, functional /cart with no unhandled-exception banner and no 500 on the merge flow. But the dedicated repro needs a logout-to-guest step (blocked by Firefox header quirk) and the malformed-mergeCarts API negative test is backend/API scope (per CSV TOOL-LIMITATION note), out of this UI runner's scope. Verify on Edge/Chrome + backend.

results.notes: Needs logout-to-guest between phases (blocked by Firefox header stability quirk) and per-item selected-for-checkout verification on /cart (cart action controls also hit the quirk). Verify on Edge/Chrome.
results.evidence: header logout + /cart control timeouts (Firefox stability quirk)

results.notes: Same blocker: logout-to-guest + /cart selection controls unclickable in Firefox (stability quirk). Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.notes: Same blocker: needs unchecking /cart selection checkboxes (cart controls blocked by Firefox stability quirk) + logout-to-guest (header quirk). Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.title: Cart Merge Selection - Selected + Unselected (ON)
results.notes: Same blocker: per-item /cart selection toggling + logout-to-guest unclickable in Firefox (stability quirk). Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (ON)
results.notes: Same blocker: mixed per-item /cart selection toggling + logout-to-guest unclickable in Firefox (stability quirk). Verify on Edge/Chrome.

results.title: Cart Merge Selection - Empty + Unselected All (OFF)
results.notes: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED per CSV: store setting 'Default selected for checkout' must be OFF (QA default is ON). Not changing admin config (out of this runner's scope / sibling-agent safety). Also gated by the same Firefox logout/cart quirk. BLOCKED per CSV's own precondition.

results.title: Cart Merge Selection - Both Selected All (OFF)
results.notes: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED per CSV: 'Default selected for checkout' = OFF (QA default ON). Config not changed (out of scope). Also gated by Firefox logout/cart quirk. BLOCKED per CSV precondition.

results.title: Cart Merge Selection - Mixed + Mixed (OFF)
results.notes: ADMIN-CONFIG REQUIRED per CSV: 'Default selected for checkout' = OFF (QA default ON). Config not changed (out of scope). Also gated by Firefox logout/cart quirk. BLOCKED per CSV precondition.

knownIssues: Firefox /cart + header stability quirk (feedback_firefox_cart_dropdown_quirk): Playwright stability gate never settles on sticky-header buttons (account menu/logout) and /cart action controls (Clear cart, selection checkboxes) and the configurable-PDP config widget (color radios, Add to cart) — 15+ click/hover timeouts. CLS-driven harness quirk, not a product defect. Blocks every case needing logout-to-guest, /cart selection toggling, or configurable-product selection.
Benign Apollo cache warning 'currencyCode missing on LineItemType' on add-to-cart (cosmetic; cart state always correct) — not filed.

Test-data drift: CFG_HAT alias storefront URL stale — real Configurable Hat is /products-with-options/configurable-products/configurable-hat (CSV says /configurable-caps-shirts/...). GUID/slug OK, category path drifted. Recommend updating aliases.json CFG_HAT.url.
Login submit: [data-test-id=login-button] click times out on Firefox stability gate; password-field Enter-to-submit works reliably (used throughout).
